div.p: Complete cycle: Forward → Loss → Backward → Update

ol.li: Step: Update parameters Wrong order = broken training!

div.p: p.data = p.data - η × p.grad where: η = learning_rate (e.g., 0.1) p.grad = ∂loss/∂p
loss.backward() Topological sort → chain rule Populates ∂L/∂p for all params
optimizer.step() p.data -= η × p.grad Direct mutation (no graph growth)
